reviews.review_description:
Does what it says on the tin, boot this up on your quest, go on your pc, open a folder, type in the "ftp://" with the numbers that appear in the headset app, set a password and that's it, start copying you're folders over to your headset. 
No more connecting USB cables and all that jazz, transfer all your music, mods and videos quickly and easily. Worth the cost for such simplicity

reviews.review_title: Easiest way to get files to/from Headset
reviews.review_description: This app does exactly what it says on the tin.  It's a SIMPLE file share, enabling us to transfer files to/from our Quest via a simplistic web interface.  No bells, no whistles, no wasted space on fancy designs or graphics.  If you want to JUST TRANSFER files without using cords or dealing with annoying "allow USB debugging" pop ups in your headset, this is the app for you.   The files transferred in both directions quickly and instantly, and were immediately available on the receiving device. No fuss, no muss.

Two quick taps and the files on your headset are now available to you on your local network, from whatever device you might want to use to grab them, delete them, or add new ones. Gone are the days of plugging in USB cables and launching specialized apps. If you create content or videos on-headset, this saves tons of time and effort. Clean, elegant, focused design just works.

reviews.review_title: Easy, simple and it works fine
reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t really sure if I even needed an app like this at first. After all, you can just plug your Quest into your PC, turn on developer mode, deal with the cables and menus, and get things done that way.

But honestly… this app just makes the whole process less annoying.

If you want to install your own APK files, copy some images for apps like Contour, or move videos to your headset, it works exactly as you’d expect. You open it, you browse your Quest’s folders, and you transfer what you want. Nothing fancy, nothing complicated — and it saves you from having to mess with USB cables every time.

It’s not doing anything magical, but it is convenient. And for me, that’s enough reason to keep it installed.
Super simple app that does exactly as advertised. I like the simplicity of FTP so it's really great that I now have a way to access the files on my headset without having to connect it.
Easy to use, one easy purchase, no subscription. It does what it's supposed to and does it well.
This is exactly what I was looking for. It simply allows me to share the files with my PC without worrying about cables.
If you want to transfer files this is the easiest way to do it.
